infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to use your camera so you can take a photo for analysis.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to read selected Apple Health data, such as steps, distance, and active calories, so it can show your daily activity in your health dashboard.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to write selected health data to Apple Health if you choose to sync activity data from the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to use your location to show relevant nearby practitioners when matches are available.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to use your microphone when you choose to record a voice command.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to access your photos so you can attach images to mood journal entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Helfi to save or manage selected journal photos when needed.
